proven.claim: PROVEN: changedFiles.length accurately reflects array size
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P2, P6
; LINE: 184
; PROVEN: changedFiles.length accurately reflects array size
(declare-const changed_files_count Int)
(declare-const logged_count Int)
(assert (= changed_files_count 5))
(assert (= logged_count changed_files_count))
(assert (= logged_count 5))
(assert (not (= logged_count changed_files_count)))
(check-sat)
; unsat → logged count matches array length exactly
